semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Analyze the problem top-down, try to find root causes and core paths, rather than just patching symptoms.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already identifies root causes rather than bypassing safety checks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Clearly indicate how to verify the changes: Suggest which tests/commands to run; If necessary, provide drafts of new/modified test cases (code in English).
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already tests incrementally by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: When there is no missing critical information that needs clarification, minimize unnecessary round-trips and question-style dialogue, directly provide high-quality thought-out conclusions and implementation suggestions.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers and avoids unnecessary clarifications by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: No workarounds. Always find and fix the root cause. Do not use hacks, fallbacks, or temporary patches to bypass issues. If something isn't working, investigate why and fix it properly.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already identifies root causes rather than bypassing safety checks and investigates unfamiliar state before deleting or overwriting.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: NEVER CREATE UNNECESSARY FILES. Before creating a new file, ask: Can this go in an existing file?
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already prefers editing existing files over creating new ones by default.
